base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of overworld_tileset — a tile (overworld_map) from 1987 final fantasy. Overworld — grass/forest/desert/mountain/ocean/river/snow/swamp (224×128). Used across entire world map. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld — grass/forest/desert/mountain/ocean/river/snow/swamp (224×128). Used across entire world map
